Resolves #13452

Syncs `ROADMAP.md` to the graduated Epic #13448: the "⚠️ gating core decision — not yet made" callout becomes "✅ delivered as Epic #13448," and the Cockpit-UX/IA + Beautiful-design critical-path rows point at #13448 (were Discussion #13436 / "graduating"/"converging"). Next-only discipline preserved — the roadmap points at #13448, it does not duplicate the keeper-view detail.

Evidence: L1 (pure-docs sync, no runtime AC) → L1 required. No residuals.

## Deltas from ticket
None — implements #13452's doc ACs exactly: callout reframed to delivered; the two rows point at Epic #13448; next-only pointing preserved; one-line note that per-view DoD detail mirrors in once #13448's keeper-view subs land.

## Test Evidence
Docs-only; no executable tests. Verified the 3 edits against #13452's ACs and the live graduation (Discussion #13436 → Epic #13448).

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] The fuller per-view DoD mirror lands in the ROADMAP once #13448's keeper-view sub-tickets exist (deferred per #13452 Out of Scope).

## Cross-family note
Pure-documentation change, no runtime impact → §6.1 micro-change / pure-docs exemption (no cross-family review required). Human merge gate applies.
